intro: Messerschmidia elegans, also known as the "Makalani palm", is a type of plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its numerous health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
